eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Ector, TX; at 10:09 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 10:24 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: City of Odessa and Ector County Emergency Management: This is a test of the emergency alerting system. No action required. This is only a test.
